temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man in a dark suit, with a serious expression, carefully wipes a framed black-and-white portrait of an older man with a white cloth. The camera then pans to reveal a wall covered with several other similar portraits. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a sense of reverence or importance around the people depicted in the portraits, suggesting they are significant figures.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, and slightly ominous musical score begins to play.)
(00:04-00:08) A man in a suit, who appears to be a leader, addresses his team. He gestures towards the portraits on the wall and introduces the people in them as the main targets for the night's operation. (Storyline: The leader officially sets the mission, identifying the individuals from the portraits as the primary targets, which raises the stakes of the operation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Authoritative, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, dramatic score continues.)
